metadata.titleDefault: Miyazaki SELENE Official Site | Girls Basketball Club in Miyazaki
metadata.description: Official site of Miyazaki SELENE, a girls' junior high basketball club based in Miyazaki City, Japan. Activity records and practice match inquiries welcome.

hero.subheadline2: We train daily to develop our players holistically and aim for the national stage.

about.title: About the Team
about.description:
We aim to be a team cheered on by basketball fans across Miyazaki,
focusing on the healthy development of every player.
about.galleryAria: Team photo gallery (swipe horizontally on mobile)
about.galleryPlaceholderBody: Photos will appear here once uploaded from the admin panel.

mission.label: Mission
mission.heading: Our Philosophy
mission.title: Our Purpose
mission.body1: Miyazaki SELENE is a club dedicated to the
mission.body2:
of junior high school girls in Miyazaki through basketball.
Beyond technical skills, we strive to cultivate teamwork, respect, and perseverance in every player.

items.title: Win the Miyazaki Club Championship
items.description: Aiming to be No. 1 in the prefecture

members.name: Rina Tokushige
members.description: Dedicated to each player's individual growth with careful, fundamental coaching.

members.name: Shinichi Hisadome
members.description: Oversees team operations and player support, with a strong focus on parent communication.

news.title: News
news.noPastNews: No past news yet. Items will appear here automatically after their scheduled date.
news.instagramLink: DM us on Instagram for practice match, joint practice, or tournament invitations

results.title: Activity Records
results.description: Thank you to all the teams we have competed against. We look forward to future matches.

items.question: What kind of team is Miyazaki SELENE?
items.answer: Miyazaki SELENE is a girls' junior high basketball club based in Miyazaki City, Miyazaki Prefecture. We train daily to develop players holistically and aim for the Miyazaki Club Championship and national championship.

items.question: Where do you practice and play?
items.answer: We primarily practice and compete at gymnasiums in Miyazaki City. Please check the News section for the latest match schedules and announcements.

items.question: Are you recruiting new members?
items.answer: Recruitment for the current school year has ended.

items.question: What tournaments do you participate in?
items.answer: We compete in official tournaments such as the Miyazaki Club Championship and the U15 Junior Winter Cup qualifier, as well as practice matches against teams throughout the region. See the Activity Records section for the latest results.

items.question: What is the origin of the name SELENE?
items.answer: SELENE comes from Selene, the goddess of the moon in Greek mythology. Just as the moon illuminates the night sky, the name was chosen to represent our aspiration to shine in the Miyazaki basketball community. That is the literal origin — but for the real reason we chose it as our team name, please ask Head Coach Tokushige directly.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.matchInviteText: For practice match invitations, joint practice sessions, tournaments, or other inquiries,
contact.instagramPrompt: please reach out via Instagram DM.
contact.replyNote: We will respond as promptly as possible, but please allow time for a reply.
